answers.decision: required_units is canonical for micro-teaching-unit IDs
exercise_operations is canonical for fine-grained exercise actions
answers.condition: field may be empty until Sprint 12 backfill

answers.decision: use skill_tags for broader taxonomy labels
instructional_role and assessment_role remain separate fields
assessment_role is optional and absent when not applicable
external exam-question metadata uses references/data/exercises overlays
answers.condition: overlay records must carry source stable ID and curriculum version

answers.decision: authored target exercises use overlays first; source mutation waits for later migration sprint
build-scripts/lib/verify_svg_geometry.py is the canonical current verifier path
R9.1 may proceed after CP-1 for blueprint repair and owned-source registry only

pattern_analysis: Answers consistently approve the naming contract, role split, scaffolding object, overlay-first strategy, and limited R9.1 unblock. Bulk exercise metadata remains blocked until Sprint 4 and CP-3.
